content.description: [Base64](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc2045)-encoded content; is mutually exclusive to `uri` (either one is required)

uri.description: Data URI ([RFC 2397](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc2397)); is mutually exclusive to `content` (either one is required)

oneOf.description: Binary file ID; is read-only (not for `PUT` or `PATCH`)

discount.description: Primary relative discount in percent (applied after `rebate` and before `discount2`)

discount2.description: Secondary relative discount in percent on top of primary discount (applied after `rebate` and `discount`)

weight.description: Shipping weight per unit in kilogram

classcode.description: Product classification code (e.g. GPC, CPV or UNSPSC code)

tariffcode.description: Tariff code (e.g. HS, CN or HTS code)

reservation.description: Reservation stock transaction ID; only set on order

transaction.description: Final stock transaction ID; only set on delivery, invoice or production

reservation.description: Reservation coupon code ID; only set on order

couponcode.description: Final coupon code ID; only set on delivery or invoice

extdata.description: Extension data field and value pairs; remove if `null`; only for `PUT` or `PATCH`

+tags.description: Tags to add; ignore existing; only for `PUT` or `PATCH`

-tags.description: Tags to remove; ignore non-existing; only for `PUT` or `PATCH`

tags.description: Tags to reset; remove all existing and add new tags; only for `PUT` or `PATCH`

fields.description: Select specified fields only; use optional alias as object key

filter.description: Eliminate results that do not match specified filter criteria

query.description: Eliminate results that do not match specified query search pattern

sort.description: Return sorted results by specified order of fields; use the minus sign (`-`) as a prefix to sort by a field in descending instead of ascending order (default)

offset.description: Return results forward from specified offset only

limit.description: Limit number of results from `offset` forward (defaults to 1000, unless `export` is true)

expand.description: Expand content of composite fields (`json`, `array` or `binfile`)

count.description: Return number of results only (`sort`, `offset`, `limit` and `expand` have no effect)

export.description: Export results as CSV file (type `text/csv`, delimiter `;`) with unbounded `limit` (`expand` has no effect) *(admin)*

expand.name: expand
expand.description: Expand content of composite fields (`json`, `array` or `binfile`)

extdata.name: extdata
extdata.description: Return all extension data field and value pairs in pseudo field `extdata`

tags.name: tags
tags.description: Return list of all tags in pseudo field `tags`

If-Match.name: If-Match
If-Match.description: Return status code **`412`** on non-matching entity tag ([RFC 7232](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7232#section-3.1))

If-Modified-Since.name: If-Modified-Since
If-Modified-Since.description: Return status code **`304`** when last modified since ([RFC 7232](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7232#section-3.4))

If-None-Match.name: If-None-Match
If-None-Match.description: Return status code **`304`** on matching entity tag ([RFC 7232](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7232#section-3.2))

If-Unmodified-Since.name: If-Unmodified-Since
If-Unmodified-Since.description: Return status code **`412`** when not last modified since ([RFC 7232](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7232#section-3.4))
